description: errorBoundary §19.6 — the boundary is transparent on success. loadItem("report") returns its value (no fail), so the boundary renders its subtree normally; neither the variant `renders` markup nor the `fallback` appears. Establishes the no-error baseline against which variant-renders / fallback diverge.
rationale: §19.6.3 the fallback/renders machinery engages ONLY when a `!`-call produces an error variant. On the success path the boundary is a transparent pass-through: the subtree (eb-ok) renders, eb-fallback + eb-notfound are absent.
